briefdescription.para: Starts continuous PDM transfer.
Stops PDM transfer.
PDM tasks.
PDM transfer is started.
PDM transfer is finished.
The PDM has written the last sample specified by MAXCNT (or the last sample after a STOP task has been received) to Data RAM.
PDM events.
Interrupt on EVENTS_STARTED event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_STOPPED event.
Interrupt on EVENTS_END event.
PDM interrupt masks.
PDM_CLK = 1.000 MHz.
PDM_CLK = 1.032 MHz.
PDM_CLK = 1.067 MHz.
PDM_CLK = 1.231 MHz.
PDM_CLK = 1.280 MHz.
PDM_CLK = 1.333 MHz.
PDM clock frequency.
Ratio of 32.
Ratio of 48.
Ratio of 50.
Ratio of 64.
Ratio of 80.
Ratio of 96.
Ratio of 100.
Ratio of 128.
Ratio of 150.
Ratio of 192.
Custom ratio.
PDM ratio between PDM_CLK and output sample rate.
Sample and store one pair (Left + Right) of 16-bit samples per RAM word.
Sample and store two successive Left samples (16 bit each) per RAM word.
PDM operation mode.
Left (or mono) is sampled on falling edge of PDM_CLK.
Left (or mono) is sampled on rising edge of PDM_CLK.
PDM sampling mode.
32MHz peripheral clock.
Audio PLL clock.
PDM clock source selection.
No delay added.
One clock cycle delay on left channel.
One clock cycle delay on right channel.
One clock cycle delay on both channels.
PDM input data sample delay.
OSR range low - 4 bits, OSR range high - 32 bits.
OSR range low - 34 bits, OSR range high - 36 bits.
OSR range low - 38 bits, OSR range high - 42 bits.
OSR range low - 44 bits, OSR range high - 48 bits.
OSR range low - 50 bits, OSR range high - 54 bits.
OSR range low - 56 bits, OSR range high - 64 bits.
OSR range low - 66 bits, OSR range high - 72 bits.
OSR range low - 74 bits, OSR range high - 84 bits.
OSR range low - 86 bits, OSR range high - 96 bits.
OSR range low - 98 bits, OSR range high - 110 bits.
OSR range low - 112 bits, OSR range high - 128 bits.
OSR range low - 130 bits, OSR range high - 146 bits.
OSR range low - 148 bits, OSR range high - 168 bits.
OSR range low - 170 bits, OSR range high - 194 bits.
OSR range low - 196 bits, OSR range high - 222 bits.
OSR range low - 224 bits, OSR range high - 256 bits.
PDM CIC filter most significant bit.
5 Hz.
10 Hz.
20 Hz.
40 Hz.
79 Hz.
PDM high pass filter -3dB gain pole frequency.
2 filter source clock cycles.
8 filter source clock cycles.
32 filter source clock cycles.
64 filter source clock cycles.
128 filter source clock cycles.
256 filter source clock cycles.
512 filter source clock cycles.
Custom number of filter source clock cycles.
PDM number of cycles for soft mute transition.
PDM gain type.
Function for triggering a PDM task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
PDM task.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of a PDM task register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
PDM task.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified PDM task.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of the PDM event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be checked.
The event has been generated.
The event has not been generated.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing a PDM event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
PDM event.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of a PDM event register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
PDM event.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified PDM event.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling PDM interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_pdm_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_pdm_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_pdm_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the subscribe configuration for a given PDM task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to set the configuration.
Channel through which to subscribe events.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the subscribe configuration for a given PDM task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to clear the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the subscribe configuration for a given PDM task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to read the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the publish configuration for a given PDM event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to set the configuration.
Channel through which to publish the event.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the publish configuration for a given PDM event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to clear the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the publish configuration for a given PDM event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to read the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the PDM peripheral.

detaileddescription.para:
p_reg
Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The PDM peripheral must be enabled before use.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the PDM peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the PDM peripheral is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The PDM peripheral is enabled.
The PDM peripheral is not enabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the PDM operation mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
PDM operation mode.
PDM sampling mode.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the PDM operation mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
PDM operation mode.
PDM sampling mode.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the PDM clock frequency.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
PDM clock frequency.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the PDM clock frequency.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the PDM prescaler divisor.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
PDM prescaler divisor.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the PDM prescaler divisor.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting up the PDM pins.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
CLK pin number.
DIN pin number.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the CLK pin.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
CLK pin number.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the DIN pin.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
DIN pin number.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the CLK pin selection.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the DIN pin selection.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for disconnecting the PDM pins.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the PDM gain.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Left channel gain.
Right channel gain.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the PDM gain.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Left channel gain.
Right channel gain.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the PDM sample buffer.

detaileddescription.para:
The amount of allocated RAM depends on the operation mode.
For stereo mode: N 32-bit words.
For mono mode: Ceil(N/2) 32-bit words.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the RAM address where samples are to be written with EasyDMA.
Number of samples to allocate memory for in EasyDMA mode.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the current PDM sample buffer address.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the current sample buffer.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting ratio between PDM_CLK and output sample rate.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Ratio between PDM_CLK and output sample rate.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting custom ratio between PDM_CLK and output sample rate.

simplesect.para: Before calling this function, the caller must ensure that custom ratio configuration has been set using nrf_pdm_ratio_set.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Custom ratio between PDM_CLK and output sample rate.

briefdescription.para: Function for configuring PDM clock source.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Clock source selection.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting PDM filter configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure with filter configuration to be set.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting PDM filter configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with filter configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling PDM high-pass filter gain pole.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
True if high-pass filter is to be enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting PDM high-pass filter gain pole.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
High-pass filter gain pole.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting PDM high-pass filter gain pole.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling PDM filter soft mute function.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
True if soft mute function is to be enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting PDM number of cycles used for soft mute transition.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Number of cycles.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting PDM number of cycles used for soft mute transition.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling PDM input data sample delay.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
True if sample delay is to be enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Macro for getting a pointer to the structure of registers of the PDM peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: PDM instance index.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the PDM peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating whether master clock source configuration is available.
Symbol indicating whether ratio configuration is available.
Symbol indicating whether PDM DMA tasks and events are present.
Symbol indicating whether PDM clock control register is available.
Symbol indicating whether 1231k PDM clock frequency is available.
Symbol indicating whether 1280k PDM clock frequency is available.
Symbol indicating whether 1333k PDM clock frequency is available.
Symbol indicating whether PDM prescaler register is available.
Symbol indicating whether PDM clock select register is available.
Symbol indicating whether PDM ratio of 32 configuration is available.
Symbol indicating whether PDM ratio of 48 configuration is available.
Symbol indicating whether PDM ratio of 50 configuration is available.
Symbol indicating whether PDM ratio of 96 configuration is available.
Symbol indicating whether PDM ratio of 100 configuration is available.
Symbol indicating whether PDM ratio of 128 configuration is available.
Symbol indicating whether PDM ratio of 150 configuration is available.
Symbol indicating whether PDM ratio of 192 configuration is available.
Symbol indicating whether PDM custom ratio configuration is available.
Symbol indicating whether PDM filter registers are available.
Minimum value of PDM gain.
Default value of PDM gain.
Maximum value of PDM gain.
Minimum value of PDM prescaler.
Maximum value of PDM prescaler.
Symbol indicating whether PDM has selectable clock source.
Hardware access layer for managing the Pulse Density Modulation (PDM) peripheral.
